# seerr_job_schedule (Data Source)

Read a background job schedule from Seerr via `/api/v1/settings/jobs`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_job_schedule" "plex_sync" {
  job_id = "plex-sync"
}

output "plex_sync_schedule" {
  value = data.seerr_job_schedule.plex_sync.schedule
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `job_id` (String) The ID of the background job (e.g., `plex-sync`, `radarr-sync`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `schedule` (String) The cron expression for the job schedule.
